Key Idea This is a classic acceptance vs rejection setup. - If price accepts above 71.8k → opens upside towards 73k – 73.5k - If price rejects here → high probability of a move lower to fill inefficiencies. Why I’m Short? - Price at HTF resistance - OI rising → crowded longs - Weak spot demand - Lots of liquidity below. Markets tend to rebalance inefficiencies before continuation. evidences.content: = ta.atr(vwma\_length) Next, dynamic volatility bands are constructed by adding and subtracting ATR-based buffers from the VWMA baseline, creating adaptive boundaries that expand during volatile conditions and contract during calm periods: upper\_band = vwma\_basis + atr\_value \ atr\_multiplier lower\_band = vwma\_basis - atr\_value \ atr\_multiplier The trend state is then determined through breakout logic that requires price to exceed these volatility-adjusted boundaries: if close > upper\_band trend\_direction := 1 else if close < lower\_band trend\_direction := -1 Finally, trend change detection identifies transitions between bullish and bearish states: trend\_turned\_bullish = trend\_direction == 1 and trend\_direction != 1 trend\_turned\_bearish = trend\_direction == -1 and [...] Below equilibrium → discount zone (buy interest) Above equilibrium → premium zone (sell interest) Professional insight: Smart money prefers buying discounts and selling premiums, not chasing price. 🔹 3.
